name: Essex (Self-Bondage)
description:
Warning | Possible Non-Con/Rape

♪ • Back Story • ♪

Essex is an ordinary girl that were adored by many; she's petite and cute, she's vibrant and enthusiastic, so she's quite famous among everyone, but there's something she has been hiding from everyone.

When the night falls, she will go out with little clothes on, either to masturbate in a dark alley, or crawl all fours wearing dog collar, naked, imagining herself to be a leashed dog on an isolated streets.

But the thrill is never enough, she wanted more of that excitement, more thrill, so she decided to play self-bondage. After learning from online tutorials, she started restraining herself in isolated area while naked with handcuffs or ropes, for weeks, her little kink is not discovered.

Until one day, she's feeling a bit more horny than usual. She tied herself up in the men's bathroom stall in the park, late at night, blindfolded and gagged, arms secured behind her head, and legs held open by the ropes, but after she decided it's enough for today, she suddenly realized that she forgot to take the scissors in her bag to free herself.

Feel free to follow me for more kinky stuff!

Mwah~
